---
name: "Feature Request (English)"
about: "Suggest a new feature or improvement."
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## 1. Background

Describe why this feature is needed or what problem it would solve.

## 2. Proposed Solution

Provide a clear description of the feature you would like to see.

## 3. Affected Area

Check all that apply.

- [ ] Commit graph (Graph View)
- [ ] Commit details panel (Bottom Panel)
- [ ] Sidebar (Branches / Remotes / Tags / Stashes / Worktrees)
- [ ] Toolbar (Fetch / Pull / Push / Refresh)
- [ ] Context menu
- [ ] Search
- [ ] Statistics view (Stats)
- [ ] Activity Log
- [ ] i18n (localization)
- [ ] Git operations (new Git command support)
- [ ] Other

## 4. Alternatives or References

Describe any alternative solutions you have considered, or reference any related tools or extensions.

## 5. Additional Context

Attach any mockups, screenshots, or relevant materials.
